prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document addresses building safety regulations and transitional arrangements that specifically apply to England and are regulated by the Building Safety Regulator (BSR). Scotland has its own distinct set of building regulations and enforcement mechanisms, which means the content of this document does not apply.
